name: 𝐇𝐔𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐑 𝐗𝐌𝐃 PRO
description: WhatsApp Bot by ᴏʙᴇᴅᴛᴇᴄʜ - Fast, Smart, Multi-Feature

SESSION_ID.description: 🔑 Paste your base64 session ID here (required to connect bot)

OWNER_NUMBER.description: 📱 Your WhatsApp number with country code (e.g. 254712345678)

OWNER_NAME.description: 👑 Bot owner name shown in menus

BOT_NAME.description: 🤖 Bot display name shown in all messages

MODE.description: 🌐 Bot mode: public (everyone uses it) or private (owner only)

MENU_IMAGE_URL.description: 🖼️ Image shown in menus (URL to an image)

DESCRIPTION.description: 📝 Bot footer text shown in menus

STICKER_NAME.description: 🩹 Sticker pack name used when making stickers

ANTI_DEL_PATH.description: 🗑️ Where to send anti-delete alerts: 'same' = same chat, 'log' = owner DM only

AUTO_BIO.description: 📝 Auto bio changer: true = enable at startup, false = disable

AUTO_BIO_INTERVAL.description: ⏱️ How often (in minutes) to change bio automatically (default 30)

WELCOME.description: 👋 true = send welcome/goodbye messages in groups

ADMIN_EVENTS.description: 📢 true = announce when members are promoted/demoted

ANTI_LINK.description: 🔗 true = automatically delete group links posted in groups

ANTI_LINK_KICK.description: 🚫 true = kick member who posts group links

ANTI_VV.description: 👁️ true = save and forward view-once messages to yourself

AUTO_STATUS_SEEN.description: 📱 true = automatically view all status updates

AUTO_STATUS_REACT.description: ❤️ true = automatically react to status updates

AUTO_STATUS_REPLY.description: 💬 true = automatically reply to status updates

AUTO_STATUS_MSG.description: 📨 Message sent as auto-reply on status (if AUTO_STATUS_REPLY is true)

AUTO_REACT.description: 😊 true = react to every incoming message with random emoji

CUSTOM_REACT.description: 🎨 true = use your own emojis for reactions (set CUSTOM_REACT_EMOJIS)

CUSTOM_REACT_EMOJIS.description: 🎭 Comma-separated emojis to use for custom reactions

READ_MESSAGE.description: 👁️ true = bot marks all messages as read automatically

READ_CMD.description: ✅ true = mark command messages as read

AUTO_TYPING.description: ⌨️ true = show typing indicator when processing

AUTO_RECORDING.description: 🎙️ true = show recording status for voice messages

AUTO_STICKER.description: 🩹 true = automatically convert every image to sticker

AUTO_VOICE.description: 🎵 true = auto-reply with random voice note

MENTION_REPLY.description: 📣 true = reply when someone mentions the bot

DELETE_LINKS.description: 🔗 true = delete links in groups without kicking member
